items.text: Taurus rising, taurus venus in the 12th house, Sagittarius north node in the 7th house, Pisces Saturn in the 10th at 0°. To be honest I have no idea what my dreams are. I think I would like to be loved, segure and appreciated extraordinarly. I struggle being content with reality my fantasies always seems so much bigger than any reality could ever be. I also feel that I tend to attract relationship struggle and conflict.

Venus in Aries on 12H, mc in Capricorn and Saturn in Taurus 1H like the rising sign (Taurus in 1H) my dream is to build an empire and teaching people all I know about life by helping them to live there destiny and to build a family, to be in love, to travel a lot, to build my dream house🌺✨
Taurus rising, Venus in Virgo 4th house, north mods in sagittarius 7th house and saturn conjunct midheaven square pluto in 7th house

hi, Taurus rising+ NN and Cancer Venus and Saturn. never been in a relationship. SO, lately my dreams have been about community, specifically a mix of people in the past plus ppl I've never met. there's a some romance related with ppl from my past, past friends too, and i just realized this, there's always a looot of ppl in my dreams that I'm interacting with. then about lessons i attract, the first thing that came to mind was friendships. I'm the type of person who moves on easily with friends when there's no reciprocity, not aligning with them anymore, and just not having them near or relevant to im doing rn.
really interested what u find out cuz I'm also getting into pattern recognition. goodluck!
Taurus rising; NN Pisces 11h; Virgo Venus + SN 5th house and Saturn conj Uranus 8h 🫪
Venus 10h pisces , Saturn 12h Taurus , north node 3h Leo. In horoscope aspects, I don’t think my life has ever went through very destructive changes such as the ones you said.

1° Taurus rising. Take this knowledge knowing my Aries-Libra axis is intercepted and my Gemini-Sagittarius axis is doubled because of it. Venus 9H Sagittarius, NN 12H Aries (intercepted,) Saturn 8H Sagittarius. My dream is to be in my own home/apartment and to have a job that pays enough for me to live comfortably

8th house Venus Sag / 1st house Saturn / Gemini North node 2nd house 😩I just wanna have good relationships with people who don’t end up getting jealous of me. and I just constantly feel slept of while I inspire people and see some people instantly get recognition so I’d love to just make money from existing 🤣
Taurus rising, Aries 12H Venus/NN square my Cancer 3H saturn. my dream is to be happy

Venus in pisces 11th house. NN in 7th Scorpio. Saturn in 9th Capricorn. I have many interests and I don't know what to choose but I guess the pattern is discovering more about the world and make art. overall, I want to live, I wanna be the cottage girl but I also want to live in a modern city, I want to study astrophysics but also be a dog walker and such. I think I attract indecisive people with low self esteem, sometimes a bit pessimistic and sarcastic. Some of them are really lovely but they are draining my energy

taurus asc, 1st house tau venus, 2nd house cancer saturn, 12th house NN
dreams: i just want to finish my never ending studies academically and spiritually bcz i wanna count cows in different countries, see other beautiful life forms and all <3 money too
attracts people for life lessons that makes me go spiral + people who needs support too
all you said from death of a person to the end is expreienced with this year 😆😭

Taurus rising, 7h venus in sag, 11h Saturn in Pisces, 6h NN in Scorpio. I dream for stability, equality, and success rooted in authentic hard work. Lots of life lessons with death, trusting the wrong people, painfully transformative relationships

Saturn in Taurus , venus in sag and north node in Leo .. I’ve attracted a lot of situations that had me question my self worth … my dreams is to just be financially stable to travel , eat good , & provide an intellectual fun life for me and my child .

I am taurus rising, lost my best friend because she changed suddently priorities.
Venus 9th house Capricorn, north node 4th house leo and saturn 6th house libra
Dream is to travel all the time and I have attracted a lesson how to have my own identity without external support.

venus in leo - on IC
NN in 7th in Sag
Saturn in 10th in Aqua
I dream of marrying rich and also be rich by myself as well

Taurus rising, Venus in taurus 1st House, NN in scorpio 7th House, Saturn in pisces 12th House :) Dream life or goals… nothing at the Moment, but I want to be successfull in my Business and having a healthy, stable relationship. Lessons came always clearly from my NN 😂 every Person who gets into my life is a mirror, trigger or lesson. But it gets better, had hard relationships with some Kind of abuse cause I had a low self-worth. Right now I have higher standarts and attract especially male persons with more capricorn Energy, what I loooooove

- 💖 Venus in Aries — 12th House
- 🧭 North Node in Capricorn — 9th House
- 🪐 Saturn in Aquarius — 10th House
I live abroad, divorced, lost my dad at an early age and 3 kids in a foreign country. girl we struggle

taurus rising with a pisces venus in 11th house, saturn in gem 2nd and taurus nn 1st.... things i've gone thru: losing something im passionate about bc of external factors, deep depression from april to july, no longer speaking to most of my siblings, extremely stilted relationships w my parents after everything, and really trying to comeback from it... also, dreams... I want to have some stability that I can control, I want people who accept me unconditionally, I want financial independence, but most of all I want to live elsewhere abroad and have the ability to work and consistently travel! Also lesson wise, I attract loads of attention, projection, obsession, and controlling people unfortunately... (in placidus, this supports everything so 😭)
Taurus rising +merc, Venus in Pisces, Saturn in cap, nn & mars in Aquarius. And 10/10 have had a wild ~10 years w many themes of death and rebirth in every area of life (12h sun/8h moon/7h Pluto).
Taurus rising , Venus in Aries 12th house, north node in Virgo in 5th house, Saturn in Aries 12th house

Taurus Rising. Venus in Taurus 12H, Saturn in Taurus 12H, NN 11H. I’ve had to deal with everything I didn’t want to. I was just sitting here grazing in the meadow & got poked relentlessly for no reason. What do I want? PEACE.
Venus in taurus 1st house - saturn in taurus 1st house | north node in leo 4th house |
Taurus rising here had a heart attack last week so…..
Venus in 2nd house Gemini, Saturn 8th house Sagittarius, North Node 12th house Aries. Dream to be financially secure, work that’s fulfilling, be published. Attract amazing friendships
taurus rising here with aries venus ,(12th house stellium all aries too), cancer north node, and saturn in taurus in my rising

taurus rising. venus in taurus (1h) mercury in cancer (3h). sun in gemini (2h). mars and saturn in leo (conjunct 4h) Lilith in virgo (5h) moon in libra in 6h. Jupiter in scorpio (7h). pluto in the 8h (ofc sagittarius) mc in Capricorn (10h) Neptune and Uranus in 11h (Neptune is Aquarius ofc and Uranus is Pisces) my north node is in my 12h which is in Aries. someone pls lmk what yall would think of me😝

Taurus rising, north node also in Taurus
sagittarius Venus in the 8th house
, satrun in cancer, my biggest dream is being as free as i can and not being dependent on anyone
and about the lessons i don't really know i feel like i attract all kind of them, family, friendships, relationships, financial reasons, isolation, and have to move a lot and not feeling like i belong anywhere
i hope that's enough for you 🩷

I’m a Taurus Rising, with Venus in Gemini in the 2nd house, Saturn in Cancer in the 3rd house, and my North Node in the 1st house. I just want to be an artist and a writer, create art and make a living out of it

Taurus rising, sag Venus in the 7th, cap nn in 8th, aqua Saturn in 9th. Im exactly who I always wanted to be since a child (psychic readings). all that's missing from my "dreams" is my mini farm and art studio and library, relo history awful but after much work finally broke that, every place of previous work shut down, I've attracted every life lesson you can think of since birth.
taurus rising, venus & saturn in 12 house, NN in the 4 house

Taurus rising, Venus: Aries 11th House
North Node: Scorpio 6th House
Saturn: Pisces 11th House.

Taurus rising,with a Saturn dominated chart,10h stelluim in Aquarius, Sag Venus in the 8h, Saturn in the 5h rx next to my ic closer to my 4h and a NN in Aquarius. These past 12 years have been torturous but specially the last year. I’ve lost a lot of stability with my family and finances and I’ve underwent a lot of transformations resulting in isolation.
taurus rising, venus in 1H (conjunct rising), taurus saturn in 12H, virgo north node 4H: to move out somewhere abroad where i actually can feel at home, where ppl are kind and friendly

Taurus rising here, with Aquarius sun aries moon. Venus is Pisces 12H, N Node cancer 3rd House, Saturn in Taurus 1st house. My dreams would be to not work, to be able to feel like my creativity could be my job just being able to create without feeling energetically tired. I haven’t necessarily been going through it but I will say I’ve had to change jobs & my energy just feels off lately. I tend to attract ppl that want attention or fixing or just energy vampires in a sense. I tend to be shown lessons on how to choose myself.

late degree Taurus rising, Aquarius Moon early degree Libra Sun/Venus/ Mercury in the 5th house, Leo North node in the 4th. it has been an absolute struggle. i went into 2019 a die hard romantic. I no longer believe in love. i was a kindergarten teacher for 10 years before I left due to my and the schools values no longer aligning.
i feel I attract power struggles. learning to stand in my power to achieve what I want and need
my dreams are to be at peace. to have a clean and peaceful home where my children laugh and play and I can write my little love stories and read my books and cook delicious food for my family.

Taurus rising / Venus in Capricorn 9H/ north node in Aries / Saturn in Leo 4hH . I’d like to be a successful singer or actor I rlly want to be in a talented spotlight where I get to express my creativity like that’s a fantasy to me other than that “ realistic wise “ financial independence and make lots lots of money and have an amazing time everyday provide a safe home for me and my loved ones . I want to be seen and admired ..?/ I kinda attract lessons of boundaries and having to trust my instincts i always have rescuing issues and lessons ALWAYS RECURRING

taurus rising scorpio venus rx, gemini saturn rx and nn in the 2nd house. I feel like I attract very chaotic emotional, over vulnerable, weak minded people. losy jobs, lost relationships due to various reasons, and my dreams are literally growing in self worth every day and become a mental role model (more than I am already), I dream of mastery and self sufficiency(genuine independence) quite literally everyday. been thru it for sure. but ironically satisfactory to break so much illusion out there.

Hi I believe you’re talking about me! Taurus Rising, get really really tight friends and lose them over night, same with jobs, will skip lunch so my toddler can eat and I still gain weight. Money is always tight. Venus in Taurus, but on the cusp 12H. North Node Sag, 11°. Saturn in Pieces Rx 0°. My dream is to make bookoo bucks so I can give my son the best life. Overall I attract people who just need a set of ears. I listen, then they take something from me and make it their whole personality.

Venus in Aries, n node in Taurus, Saturn in Sagittarius. Dream is to have self sufficient homestead in nature far from civilization, attract all lessons because I have to learn everything firsthand but I tend to get it the first time around and not need several repeat lessons

Taurus rising. North node in cancer 3h. Venus and mars Aries 12 house. Oh and an 8th h stellium. I attract bad relationship after bad relationship and dramatic endings. It’s teaching me boundaries and to be discerning before I let people in.

Taurus rising, Saturn rx in 1st h, I do have a Libra Venus but in 6th h, north node in Leo 4th h retrograde. I do have a 7th h Scorpio stellium conjunct Chiron Lilith Juno and aura and an 8th h Pluto so it could be impacted by that but I just want someone to show some form of love or reciprocal care, a home that is my own, a job I like, I want to be able to create everyday and have a community to care for. For context, I was bullied out of one job by other women, gained 2 stalkers and was sexually harassed at another job, this job I’m currently being harassed. No one who has shown interest in me has had it be past physical and has treated me as disposable and I’m struggling to trust my own reality and have closed myself off to other people entirely because I’m emotionally exhausted. My uncle was murdered, a parent and a sibling died recently, my brother had a huge accident and almost passed away, a partner attempted to 💀 me, I was ghosted when I moved country for him the moment I landed, I lost a child, car was destroyed, was robbed by a friend, my house burnt down, I had to help my mother recover from another addiction spiral, I had to walk through swamp land to look for a family members body, I lost everything three times over, also some guy that had been welcomed into my home threatened the lives of myself and the other women in the house and threatened us with sexual violence literally the other week. This has been a wild ride, what I want is so simple and because I attract violent or broken people, bad situations surrounding any sort of reciprocity, being punished for existing in any kind of community environment, being put in awful situations anytime I try to befriend or attempt to help anyone, losing people closest to me etc I tried to look at myself and see where I was going wrong, after working on myself a lot and a lot of therapy I still attracted those situations so now I’ve closed off and I panic whenever anyone attempts to befriend me or approach me romantically, I have for the past week been a mess emotionally every single night, I’ve been so stressed my hair is falling out and I’m physically sick. This is quite the time.

Venus Aquarius 10h, NN Scorpio 7h, Saturn pisces 11h. My dream rn is to actually see the reality of a successful business. I keep dealing with unrequited love in my platonic and romantic relationships.

Taurus rising here w/ Venus in the 1st house. North node is in Libra in my 5th & currently going through my Saturn return with Saturn in Aries in my 10th house. My dream is to be healthy, have a big family while living on a farm and being in nature with my animals & honestly to just be left alone by the universe I feel like I haven’t had a break since I came outta the womb, I need some good vibes 🫶🏻
Venus 12th house Aries, North Node 2nd House Gemini, Saturn 7th Scorpio. Dreams: hmmm 🤔
venus 7th house, North node 7th, Saturn 11th

Venus in cancer, n.n conjunct Leo I.c, taurus saturn conjunct asc.
I just want peace lol, inner peace and outer peace, a quiet place a can call my own, close to nature, close to a city, that's beautiful and peaceful.
Just space, emotional space, physical space, energetic space, the knowing that I am somewhere where I have time and safety, and I can just be. This is my dream.
venus in aries, nn in sagg, saturn in cancer. no dreams, adhd keeps me changing goals every few days 😂😂😂
i see a lot of comments about ppl with Saturn in Capricorn wanting to travel. weird. cause i do too.

Venus: 2°35′ Scorpio
North Node: 0°11′ Gemini
Saturn: 14°00′ Scorpio
Dream: To travel and see the world.

Venus in Scorpio 7H, North node in Leo 4h, and Saturn in Aries 12H. My dream is to open animal shelters/sanctuaries, food resources for homelessness or people sleeping in their cars. Such as meal vouchers through app corporations connecting them with food banks and restaurants offering a meal each day. Food scarcity is a mindset the big guys want us to believe but in reality we waste so much every day. TooGoodToGo helps but not every family can afford or have the resources to purchase them. Seems like politicians always get a lump of money to better the community but they themselves don’t know how to properly allocate resources because a lot of the times they have never gone through such life experience to know what can actually help
